ddls:
CREATE TABLE "instruments" (
  "instrument_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each instrument */,
  "instrument_name" TEXT /* Name of the instrument (e.g., CORN, LEANHOG) */,
  "instrument_type" TEXT /* Type of instrument (e.g., commodity, currency, stock) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the instrument */,
  "min_trade_size" INTEGER /* Minimum size for a trade in this instrument */,
  "max_trade_size" INTEGER /* Maximum size for a trade in this instrument */,
  "tick_size" REAL /* Smallest increment by which the price of the instrument can move */,
  "trading_cost" REAL /* Cost associated with trading this instrument */,
  "liquidity" TEXT /* Measure of how easily the instrument can be bought or sold without affecting its price */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last time the instrument details were updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("instrument_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trading_data" (
  "trading_data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trading data entry */,
  "instrument_id" INTEGER /* ID of the instrument the data belongs to */,
  "slippage" REAL /* Slippage value for the instrument */,
  "per_block" REAL /* Block size for the instrument */,
  "percentage" REAL /* Percentage value for the instrument */,
  "per_trade" REAL /* Per-trade value for the instrument */,
  "trade_date" TEXT /* Date when the trading data was recorded */,
  "volume" INTEGER /* Total volume of trades for the instrument on the given date */,
  "open_price" REAL /* Opening price of the instrument on the given date */,
  "close_price" REAL /* Closing price of the instrument on the given date */,
  "high_price" REAL /* Highest price of the instrument on the given date */,
  "low_price" REAL /* Lowest price of the instrument on the given date */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trading_data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trading_data_instrument_id FOREIGN KEY ("instrument_id") REFERENCES instruments ("instrument_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., trader, risk manager, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last time the user logged in */,
  "account_status" TEXT /* Status of the user's account (e.g., active, suspended) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "risk_management" (
  "risk_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each risk entry */,
  "instrument_id" INTEGER /* ID of the instrument the risk data belongs to */,
  "risk_level" TEXT /* Risk level for the instrument (e.g., low, medium, high) */,
  "alert_threshold" REAL /* Alert threshold value for the instrument */,
  "alert_status" TEXT /* Status of the alert (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "risk_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the risk */,
  "risk_impact" TEXT /* Potential impact of the risk */,
  "mitigation_strategies" TEXT /* Strategies to mitigate the risk */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last time the risk data was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("risk_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_risk_management_instrument_id FOREIGN KEY ("instrument_id") REFERENCES instruments ("instrument_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "market_data" (
  "market_data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each market data entry */,
  "instrument_id" INTEGER /* ID of the instrument the data belongs to */,
  "market_price" REAL /* Current market price of the instrument */,
  "market_news" TEXT /* Market news and events related to the instrument */,
  "volume" INTEGER /* Total volume of trades for the instrument on the given date */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the market data was recorded */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the market data (e.g., API, manual entry) */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last time the market data was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("market_data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_market_data_instrument_id FOREIGN KEY ("instrument_id") REFERENCES instruments ("instrument_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trades" (
  "trade_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trade */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who executed the trade */,
  "instrument_id" INTEGER /* ID of the instrument traded */,
  "trade_date" TEXT /* Date the trade was executed */,
  "trade_price" REAL /* Price at which the trade was executed */,
  "trade_size" INTEGER /* Size of the trade */,
  "trade_type" TEXT /* Type of trade (e.g., buy, sell) */,
  "trade_status" TEXT /* Status of the trade (e.g., open, closed) */,
  "trade_profit_loss" REAL /* Profit or loss from the trade */,
  "trade_fee" REAL /* Fee associated with the trade */,
  "trade_comment" TEXT /* Any comments or notes related to the trade */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trade_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trades_instrument_id FOREIGN KEY ("instrument_id") REFERENCES instruments ("instrument_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trades_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "risk_id" INTEGER /* ID of the risk entry that triggered the alert */,
  "alert_date" TEXT /* Date the alert was generated */,
  "alert_message" TEXT /* Message describing the alert */,
  "alert_severity" TEXT /* Severity of the alert (e.g., low, medium, high) */,
  "alert_action" TEXT /* Recommended action to take in response to the alert */,
  "alert_details" TEXT /* Additional details about the alert */,
  "alert_resolved" TEXT /* Whether the alert has been resolved (e.g., yes, no) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_risk_id FOREIGN KEY ("risk_id") REFERENCES risk_management ("risk_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "news" (
  "news_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each news article */,
  "market_data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the market data entry related to the news article */,
  "news_title" TEXT /* Title of the news article */,
  "news_content" TEXT /* Content of the news article */,
  "news_date" TEXT /* Date the news article was published */,
  "news_source" TEXT /* Source of the news article (e.g., Reuters, Bloomberg) */,
  "news_url" TEXT /* URL to the full news article */,
  "news_summary" TEXT /* Summary of the news article */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("news_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_news_market_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("market_data_id") REFERENCES market_data ("market_data_id")
)
